summary:
Excellent! The fix is complete. The issue was an off-by-one error in the batch slicing logic. Changed line 14 from:

```python
end = start + batch_size - 1  # grab exactly batch_size items
```

to:

```python
end = start + batch_size  # Python slicing is exclusive, so this grabs batch_size items
```

All tests now pass, confirming that all records are processed correctly across batch boundaries.
